text.tspan: Number of deaths from smoking in 1990 vs. 2021
The estimated number of deaths from all causes attributed to smoking. Deaths attributed to smoking have increased in
countries below the diagonal line, and decreased in countries above it.
Number of deaths from smoking in 2021
Number of deaths from smoking in 1990
Data source: IHME, Global Burden of Disease (2024); World Bank (2024)
